approved_results.text: No empirical prevalence estimate or association test was produced in this run because I could not obtain a row-level dataset containing e-cigarette use, epilepsy, age, and sex variables from the provided materials. The saved log documents the retrieval attempts and the mismatch between the available BRFSS mirror and the requested topic.

reference_catalog.text: GitHub repository for the suggested BRFSS mirror. Accession: anandprakash0/Diabetes-prediction:data/diabetes_012_health_indicators_BRFSS2015.csv. https://raw.githubusercontent.com/anandprakash0/Diabetes-prediction/main/data/diabetes_012_health_indicators_BRFSS2015.csv. Repository inspection showed a diabetes BRFSS subset file in the data directory rather than a file obviously containing e-cigarette and epilepsy variables.

summary: Paper checks passed with 1 artifact-backed result(s).
